queries.question: show me the limits for checking accounts
queries.sql: select Maximum_Deposit_Amount from checkingaccounts where checking_account = 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?maximum_deposit_amount WHERE {
  ?checkingaccounts a :CheckingAccounts .
  ?checkingaccounts p:Maximum_Deposit_Amount ?maximum_deposit_amount .
  ?checkingaccounts p:Checking_Account ?checking_account_f .
  FILTER((STR(?checking_account_f) = "1" || STR(?checking_account_f) = "1.0"))
}

queries.question: show me the limits for checking accounts
queries.sql: select Monthly_Cap from checkingaccounts where checking_account = 1

PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>

}

queries.question: show me the limits for checking accounts

queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?maximum_deposit_amount ?monthly_cap WHERE {
  ?checkingaccounts a :CheckingAccounts .

  ?checkingaccounts p:Checking_Account ?checking_account_f .

}

queries.question: Give me the maximum deposit and monthly cap of each customer.
queries.sql: select Customers.FullName, checkingaccounts.Maximum_Deposit_Amount, Monthly_Cap from checkingaccounts join customers on customers.customerid = checkingaccounts.customerid
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname ?maximum_deposit_amount ?monthly_cap WHERE {
  ?checkingaccounts a :CheckingAccounts .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?checkingaccounts p:hasCustomers ?customers .
  ?customers p:name ?fullname .
  ?checkingaccounts p:Maximum_Deposit_Amount ?maximum_deposit_amount .
  ?checkingaccounts p:Monthly_Cap ?monthly_cap .
}
